attributes.description: Jammu & Kashmir Bank (J&K Bank), incorporated in Jammu & Kashmir, India, is a publicly held banking company engaged in providing a wide range of banking services including Retail Banking, Corporate Banking & Treasury Operations.[1] It is the only Private Sector Bank in the country assigned with responsibility of convening State/UT Level Bankers’ Committee (SLBC/UTLBC) meetings. The Bank continued to discharge its lead bank responsibility satisfactorily in 12 districts of UT of J&K, i.e. Srinagar, Ganderbal, Budgam, Baramulla, Bandipora, Kupwara, Anantnag, Kulgam, Pulwama, Shopian, Poonch and Rajouri.[2]

Jammu & Kashmir Bank (J&K Bank), incorporated in Jammu & Kashmir, India, is a publicly held banking company engaged in providing a wide range of banking services including Retail Banking, Corporate Banking & Treasury Operations.[1] It is the only Private Sector Bank in the country assigned with responsibility of convening State/UT Level Bankers’ Committee (SLBC/UTLBC) meetings. The Bank continued to discharge its lead bank responsibility satisfactorily in 12 districts of UT of J&K, i.e. Srinagar, Ganderbal, Budgam, Baramulla, Bandipora, Kupwara, Anantnag, Kulgam, Pulwama, Shopian, Poonch and Rajouri.[2]
